purpose: Host-side memory pressure classification and launch gating. Facts and gates only; no automatic process killing.

watch.reason: Keep sustained background work from making early pressure worse.

warm.reason: Defer sustained work and heavy unattended starts while memory is constrained.

hot.reason: Protect interactive work under memory pressure.

critical.reason: Avoid new pressure while OOM risk is high.

protected_workloads.games: Game guard is authoritative for active games; memory policy must not mutate or kill game processes.
protected_workloads.dictation: Warm dictation may be large but is operator-facing; report it before suggesting stop/restart.
protected_workloads.project_repos: Do not write memory state into abyss-stack, /work, or game roots.
protected_workloads.persistent_models: Promoted resident model servers and stack model containers are protected capabilities; route new work around them instead of demoting them to on-demand or stopping them as default relief.

zram_swap_relief.reason: High zram occupancy alone is a launch-risk signal, not an OOM-risk signal, while MemAvailable or real zram headroom is present and PSI stalls stay below hot-pressure thresholds. Mild PSI should soften routing instead of promoting healthy zram occupancy to hot or critical.
